{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Fiber Installation Support Technician",
  "description": "Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.
Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Installation Support Technician
Job Location:&nbsp;Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Fiber Installation Support Technician to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will assist our Fiber teams in executing fiber optic cable installations, ensuring efficient and high-quality work.
	This role involves supporting field operations, performing various tasks, and collaborating with the team to accelerate project timelines and minimize downtime.
	The ideal candidate must be reachable and available to work on Saturdays and Sundays


Key Responsibilities


	Cable Installation: Assist in running fiber optic cables through ducts, conduits, and other pathways.
	HDPE Duct Laying: Lay and manage High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) ducts for fiber optic cable protection and organization.
	Interlock Removal: Safely remove interlocks and other obstacles to facilitate smooth cable installation.
	Thrust Boring: Perform thrust boring tasks to create pathways for fiber optic cables under roads, pathways, or other obstacles.
	Field Support: Provide general support to the Fiber team during installations, troubleshooting, and maintenance activities.
	Safety Compliance: Adhere to safety protocols and guidelines to ensure a safe working environment for yourself and others.
	Collaboration: Work effectively with other technicians, engineers, and project managers to ensure projects are completed on time and to specification.
	Documentation: Maintain accurate records of work performed, including cable routes, duct layouts, and any issues encountered.


Requirements


	Education: Diploma or degree in a relevant field (e.g., telecommunications, electrical engineering, or related discipline).
	Experience: Prior experience in fiber optic cable installation, telecommunications, or a similar field is preferred.


Skills:


	Knowledge of fiber optic cables and installation techniques.
	Ability to work in various environments, including outdoor and confined spaces.
	Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Physical fitness and ability to lift heavy objects, work at heights, and endure varying weather conditions.
	Certifications: Relevant certifications in fiber optics or telecommunications are a plus


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;recruitment@cobranet.ng&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Cobranet Limited"
    
  },

      "addressCountry": "NG"
     
      
    }
  },

  },

    "@type": "MonetaryAmount",

Fiber Installation Support Technician Job at Cobranet Limited




        
    

        
        Cobranet Limited; a reputable organization incorporated in 2003 and provides internet solutions. Our footprint and range of products have grown immensely since incorporation and we are proud to provide every segment of society with a reliable link to the digital universe.
Our entire network topology is rugged, dynamic and fully redundant with negligible downtimes: content showing extremely high availability exceeding 99.5%. Our promise is to continue providing innovative solutions at the best feature-to-price and service-to-price ratio.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Fiber Installation Support Technician
Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	We are seeking a highly motivated and skilled Fiber Installation Support Technician to join our team.
	The ideal candidate will assist our Fiber teams in executing fiber optic cable installations, ensuring efficient and high-quality work.
	This role involves supporting field operations, performing various tasks, and collaborating with the team to accelerate project timelines and minimize downtime.
	The ideal candidate must be reachable and available to work on Saturdays and Sundays


Key Responsibilities


	Cable Installation: Assist in running fiber optic cables through ducts, conduits, and other pathways.
	HDPE Duct Laying: Lay and manage High-Density Polyethylene (HDPE) ducts for fiber optic cable protection and organization.
	Interlock Removal: Safely remove interlocks and other obstacles to facilitate smooth cable installation.
	Thrust Boring: Perform thrust boring tasks to create pathways for fiber optic cables under roads, pathways, or other obstacles.
	Field Support: Provide general support to the Fiber team during installations, troubleshooting, and maintenance activities.
	Safety Compliance: Adhere to safety protocols and guidelines to ensure a safe working environment for yourself and others.
	Collaboration: Work effectively with other technicians, engineers, and project managers to ensure projects are completed on time and to specification.
	Documentation: Maintain accurate records of work performed, including cable routes, duct layouts, and any issues encountered.


Requirements


	Education: Diploma or degree in a relevant field (e.g., telecommunications, electrical engineering, or related discipline).
	Experience: Prior experience in fiber optic cable installation, telecommunications, or a similar field is preferred.


Skills:


	Knowledge of fiber optic cables and installation techniques.
	Ability to work in various environments, including outdoor and confined spaces.
	Strong problem-solving and troubleshooting skills.
	Excellent communication and teamwork abilities.
	Physical fitness and ability to lift heavy objects, work at heights, and endure varying weather conditions.
	Certifications: Relevant certifications in fiber optics or telecommunications are a plus


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Junior Logistics Officer",
  "description": "At Elvaridah, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Logistics Officer
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time
Industry: Haulage / Logistics

Job Summary


	The Junior Logistics Officer will support the coordination of day-to-day logistics and haulage operations
	This role is ideal for an early-career professional looking to build experience in transportation and supply chain management.
	The successful candidate will assist in tracking deliveries, coordinating drivers, and ensuring smooth operational flow.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in planning and coordinating daily deliveries and haulage activities.
	Track shipments and provide real-time updates to clients and internal teams.
	Communicate with drivers to ensure timely pickups and deliveries.
	Support documentation processes including waybills, delivery notes, and invoices.
	Maintain accurate logistics records and update tracking systems. ? Assist in monitoring fuel usage and reporting operational issues.
	Escalate delays, breakdowns, or delivery challenges to senior staff. ? Support general administrative tasks within the logistics unit.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree or HND in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	1 - 2 years of experience
	Basic understanding of logistics or transportation operations.
	Familiarity with Lagos routes is an advantage.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially MS Excel)
	Good communication and willingness to learn.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidate should send their applications to:&nbsp;careers@elvaridah.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Junior Logistics Officer Job at Elvaridah




        
    

        
        At Elvaridah, we emphasize on the critical matters and prospects of organizations such as business growth, strategy, planning, marketing, structure, and people management across different industries. We help companies focus on the growth of their businesses while aligning costs with strategy. With our all-inclusive approach and expertise, we capture values across the boundaries of any organization. Elvaridah focuses on optimizing all the different parts of a business as a unit.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Logistics Officer
Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full Time
Industry: Haulage / Logistics

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Junior Logistics Officer will support the coordination of day-to-day logistics and haulage operations
	This role is ideal for an early-career professional looking to build experience in transportation and supply chain management.
	The successful candidate will assist in tracking deliveries, coordinating drivers, and ensuring smooth operational flow.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in planning and coordinating daily deliveries and haulage activities.
	Track shipments and provide real-time updates to clients and internal teams.
	Communicate with drivers to ensure timely pickups and deliveries.
	Support documentation processes including waybills, delivery notes, and invoices.
	Maintain accurate logistics records and update tracking systems. ? Assist in monitoring fuel usage and reporting operational issues.
	Escalate delays, breakdowns, or delivery challenges to senior staff. ? Support general administrative tasks within the logistics unit.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree or HND in Logistics, Supply Chain Management, Business Administration, or a related field.
	1 - 2 years of experience
	Basic understanding of logistics or transportation operations.
	Familiarity with Lagos routes is an advantage.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (especially MS Excel)
	Good communication and willingness to learn.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidate should send their applications to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

So far, we have worked with clients in different industries and sectors such as Agriculture, Real Estate, Hospitality, Engineering &amp; Construction, Education, Logistics, Health &amp; Environment, Oil &amp; gas, Retail and more, to achieve their itemized objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
Job Location:&nbsp;Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Supervise installation and commissioning of equipment
	Troubleshoot electrical faults and carry out repairs
	Conduct routine maintenance and system upgrades
	Ensure compliance with safety and regulatory standards

Electrical Engineer Job at Natafamdavid Consulting Nigeria Limited i




        
    

        
        Natafamdavid Consulting Nigeria Limited is a business growth consultancy company offering tailor made services targeted at building profitable and productive companies with a focus on building sustainable enterprises, comprehensive HR advisory services, brand growth, corporate governance, business strategy and advisory services at different sections of the value chain.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Our services are across-the-board and we are driven by a strong passion to create value for our clients. From the het go, we set out to work with clients across diverse industries, providing strategic solutions to increase our success matrix, productivity, profitability. So far, we have worked with clients in different industries and sectors such as Agriculture, Real Estate, Hospitality, Engineering & Construction, Education, Logistics, Health & Environment, Oil & gas, Retail and more, to achieve their itemized objectives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Electrical Engineer
Job Location: Gbagada, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Supervise installation and commissioning of equipment
	Troubleshoot electrical faults and carry out repairs
	Conduct routine maintenance and system upgrades
	Ensure compliance with safety and regulatory standards
	Prepare technical reports and maintenance logs
	Collaborate with procurement and project teams


Requirements


	B.Sc. / HND in Electrical Engineering or related field
	2–5 years of experience in elevators, escalators, or similar systems
	Strong knowledge of control systems, PLCs, and VFDs
	Experience in installation, testing, and maintenance
	Ability to read and interpret electrical drawings
	Good problem-solving and analytical skills
	Willingness to travel to project sites when required
	Experience with international elevator brands (e.g., Otis, Schindler, KONE)
	Professional certification (COREN or equivalent)


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.

  "description": "Morkem media as a video production company that provided sense of short video for brand cross Nigeria to help promote our clients product and services, company profile video production,event video presentation

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator
Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

&nbsp;Responsibilities


	Prepare well-structured drafts using digital publishing platforms
	Create and distribute marketing copy to advertise our company and products
	Interview industry professionals and incorporate their views in blog posts
	Edit and proofread written pieces before publication
	Conduct keyword research and use SEO guidelines to optimize content
	Promote content on social networks and monitor engagement (e.g. comments and shares)
	Identify customers&rsquo; needs and recommend new topics
	Coordinate with marketing and design teams to illustrate articles
	Measure web traffic to content (e.g. conversion and bounce rates)
	Update our websites as needed.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;morkemmeadiacompany@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Content Creator Job at Morkem Nigeria




        
    

        
        Morkem media as a video production company that provided sense of short video for brand cross Nigeria to help promote our clients product and services, company profile video production,event video presentation

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Content Creator
Job Location: Lagos 
Employment Type: Full-time

 Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Prepare well-structured drafts using digital publishing platforms
	Create and distribute marketing copy to advertise our company and products
	Interview industry professionals and incorporate their views in blog posts
	Edit and proofread written pieces before publication
	Conduct keyword research and use SEO guidelines to optimize content
	Promote content on social networks and monitor engagement (e.g. comments and shares)
	Identify customers’ needs and recommend new topics
	Coordinate with marketing and design teams to illustrate articles
	Measure web traffic to content (e.g. conversion and bounce rates)
	Update our websites as needed.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Human Resource Officer",
  "description": "Pally Agro Products Limited is a leading Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) company with its factory located at Abeokuta Ogun State and head office at Lagos State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Human Resource Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Ashipa Village, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are currently seeking an experienced Senior Human Resources Officer to join our team and contribute to our continued success.
	As the Senior Human Resources Officer, you will play a critical role in managing and overseeing the HR functions of the company.
	You will be responsible for developing and implementing HR strategies, managing employee relations, ensuring compliance with labor laws, and fostering a positive workplace culture.
	This role requires a proactive and experienced HR professional with strong leadership skills and a deep understanding of HR best practices in the FMCG industry.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures in line with company objectives.
	Manage the recruitment and selection process, ensuring the right talent is hired.
	Oversee employee relations, including handling grievances, disputes, and disciplinary actions.
	Ensure compliance with local labor laws and regulations.
	Coordinate and manage performance appraisal systems and provide recommendations for improvements.
	Lead employee engagement initiatives to promote a positive work environment.
	Provide guidance and support to line managers on HR-related matters.
	Manage training and development programs to enhance employee skills and career growth.
	Oversee compensation and benefits administration, ensuring competitiveness in the market.
	Prepare HR reports and provide insights to senior management on HR metrics.
	Lead and manage the HR team, providing mentorship and development opportunities.


Qualifications


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	5 - 7 years of HR experience, with at least 3 years in a senior HR role within the FMCG sector.
	Strong knowledge of labor laws, HR best practices, and compliance requirements.
	Proven experience in managing employee relations and handling complex HR issues.
	Excellent leadership and people management skills.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
	HR certification (e.g., CIPM, SHRM) is an advantage.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and a cover letter outlining their qualifications and experience to:&nbsp;hr@pallyagro.ng&nbsp;using &quot;Senior Human Resources Officer Application&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Senior Human Resource Officer Job at Pally Agro Products Limited




        
    

        
        Pally Agro Products Limited is a leading Fast-Moving Consumer Goods (FMCG) company with its factory located at Abeokuta Ogun State and head office at Lagos State.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Human Resource Officer

Job Location: Ashipa Village, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are currently seeking an experienced Senior Human Resources Officer to join our team and contribute to our continued success.
	As the Senior Human Resources Officer, you will play a critical role in managing and overseeing the HR functions of the company.
	You will be responsible for developing and implementing HR strategies, managing employee relations, ensuring compliance with labor laws, and fostering a positive workplace culture.
	This role requires a proactive and experienced HR professional with strong leadership skills and a deep understanding of HR best practices in the FMCG industry.


Key Responsibilities


	Develop and implement HR policies and procedures in line with company objectives.
	Manage the recruitment and selection process, ensuring the right talent is hired.
	Oversee employee relations, including handling grievances, disputes, and disciplinary actions.
	Ensure compliance with local labor laws and regulations.
	Coordinate and manage performance appraisal systems and provide recommendations for improvements.
	Lead employee engagement initiatives to promote a positive work environment.
	Provide guidance and support to line managers on HR-related matters.
	Manage training and development programs to enhance employee skills and career growth.
	Oversee compensation and benefits administration, ensuring competitiveness in the market.
	Prepare HR reports and provide insights to senior management on HR metrics.
	Lead and manage the HR team, providing mentorship and development opportunities.


Qualifications


	Bachelor’s Degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or a related field.
	5 - 7 years of HR experience, with at least 3 years in a senior HR role within the FMCG sector.
	Strong knowledge of labor laws, HR best practices, and compliance requirements.
	Proven experience in managing employee relations and handling complex HR issues.
	Excellent leadership and people management skills.
	Strong interpersonal and communication skills.
	Ability to work effectively in a fast-paced and dynamic environment.
	HR certification (e.g., CIPM, SHRM) is an advantage.


Salary
N300,000 - N400,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their resume and a cover letter outlining their qualifications and experience to: [email protected] using "Senior Human Resources Officer Application" as the subject of the email.
